ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "note" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Guard, Forward, Center) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is located */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "team_general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "team_head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" TEXT /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "is_home" INTEGER /* Whether the game was played at home */,
  "is_starter" INTEGER /* Whether the player started the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* City and state where the game was played */,
  "game_arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_referees" TEXT /* List of referees officiating the game */,
  "game_tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., '100-95') */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is from */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "mp" REAL /* Minutes played */,
  "ts_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "efg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "fg3a_per_fga_pct" REAL /* 3-point attempt percentage */,
  "fta_per_fga_pct" REAL /* Free throw attempt percentage */,
  "orb_pct" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "drb_pct" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage */,
  "trb_pct" REAL /* Total rebound percentage */,
  "ast_pct" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "stl_pct" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "blk_pct" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  "tov_pct" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "usg_pct" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "off_rtg" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "def_rtg" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Box plus/minus */,
  "fgm" REAL /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., '100-95') */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic is from */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the statistic is for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Losses */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-point percentage */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_won_home" INTEGER /* Number of home games won */,
  "games_lost_home" INTEGER /* Number of home games lost */,
  "games_won_away" INTEGER /* Number of away games won */,
  "games_lost_away" INTEGER /* Number of away games lost */,
  "playoff_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games played */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games won */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games lost */,
  "season_outcome" TEXT /* Summary of the season outcome (e.g., 'Won Conference Finals') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff appearance */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the playoff appearance is from */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the playoff appearance is for */,
  "series_wins" INTEGER /* Series wins */,
  "series_losses" INTEGER /* Series losses */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the championship */,
  "series_outcome" TEXT /* Summary of the series outcome (e.g., 'Lost in First Round') */,
  "playoff_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_assists" INTEGER /* Assists in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_steals" INTEGER /* Steals in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
